creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Terse reply that fit's the style of the PR: "Yes, it does." 

More verbose reasoning for closing the PR: those warnings are part of 
the pseudo-Pascal style `team' has been written in.  As such, they aren't 
``fixable'' without breaking the style of the original code.  I won't 
do _that_.
